sprint: Object Strip / Selection Now Reads Builder-Authored Layer Pack Content
task: Diagnosed and fixed a real gap: theme Layer Pack content (Museum Caption, Wax Seal, Gallery Spotlight, etc.) rendered correctly to canvas but was never recorded in the hit-test/enumeration arrays the Object Strip and click-selection both read from, so it was invisible to the Object Strip and unclickable on the canvas despite drawing correctly. renderer/slideRenderer.js's three Layer Pack draw functions now return the bbox they drew; a new accumulator folds into _lastSceneElements exactly once, after the ordering-hazard-safe point in render(). js/objectStrip.js gained a de-duplicated loop over SlideRenderer.getSceneElements() to surface these as locked 'Part of the world' cards. See CLAUDE.md's matching entry for the full account.
